title: An LLM that designs M5Stack hardware builds
abstract: Tired of struggling to come up with hardware project ideas? Try Show HN, an AI that not only designs M5Stack builds but also sparks creative brainstorming sessions with you! Imagine telling the AI, "Hey, I need a smart watering device," and it instantly presents you with a design. This is the magic of technology at its finest!
abstract_zh: 你还在为找不到灵感设计硬件项目而烦恼吗？来试试Show HN，这个超能AI不仅能帮你设计M5Stack硬件构建方案，还能和你一起脑洞大开！想象一下，你对着屏幕说：“嘿，我想要一个自动浇水的小装置”，Show HN就能立刻给你拿出设计方案。这不就是科技带来的魔法嘛！
